# Wrestle With Jimmy (WWJ)

Wrestle With Jimmy (WWJ) is Austin, Texas's premier Weezer cover band. The band performs the full Weezer catalog — with a focus on the Blue Album and Pinkerton — at venues, breweries, festivals, and private events across Austin and the greater Texas region.

## What We Play

WWJ covers Weezer's most beloved material: Buddy Holly, Undone – The Sweater Song, Say It Ain't So, Pork and Beans, Hash Pipe, Beverly Hills, Island in the Sun, and more. Sets run approximately 45–60 minutes and are built for live audiences who want the full Weezer experience delivered loud, tight, and with genuine enthusiasm.

## Where We've Played

The band has performed at more than 13 Austin-area venues since 2024, including Mohawk Austin, Hole in the Wall, Radio/East, Come and Take It Live, Still Austin Whiskey Co., Central Machine Works, The Far Out Lounge (Brisketfest 2025), Independence Brewing Company, and Bungalow.

## Upcoming Shows

- May 14, 2026 — Meanwhile Brewing Company, Austin TX (free, ticketed via Prekindle)
- May 23, 2026 — The Rock-Box, San Antonio TX (ticketed via Stubwire)

## Booking

Wrestle With Jimmy is available for bookings at venues, festivals, corporate events, and private parties in Austin and across Texas. To inquire about booking, email: wrestlewithjimmyatx@gmail.com

## Links

- Website: https://wrestlewithjimmy.com
- Booking contact: wrestlewithjimmyatx@gmail.com
